By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy. Robbie Moore I'm Robbie Moore, your Member of Parliament for Keighley and Ilkley. I'm working hard to stand up for our community and deliver the change we all want to see. Here, you can find my latest news, campaign videos and more about me. If you've got an issue of concern, please do not hesitate to get in touch. Join my Campaign Latest news Break away from Bradford Council Find out more Secure a rebuild of our Airedale Hospital ✅ Find out more Protect our greenbelt Find out more Tackle child sexual exploitation Find out more Secure record investment for our area ✅ Find out more Build the Silsden-Steeton Bridge Find out more Latest News Robbie Moore MP urges Miliband to intervene over Bronte Country wind farm consultation 2nd April 2026 Read full article Contact Robbie Moore Office of Robbie Moore MP Shan House, 80-86 North St, Keighley, BD21 3AG 01535 600538 [email protected] When writing to me by letter or email please always include your full name and home address including postcode. Please be aware I receive a large volume of correspondence, but will endeavour to respond as quickly as possible. pages.title: Digital ID - Have your say | Robbie Moore MP
pages.meta_description: On Monday 8 December, I will be leading the debate AGAINST the rollout of mandatory digital ID.The official parliamentary petition has garnered nearly 3 million signatures across the UK.
headings: h3: Robbie Moore MP Delivering your priorities for Keighley and Ilkley
pages.text_excerpt: Digital ID - Have your say | Robbie Moore MP Skip to main content Robbie Moore MP Main navigation Home Campaigns Keighley & Ilkley News 🏥 New Airedale Hospital SECURED Contact 🔍 Search Digital ID - Have your say Stop The Scouts Tax - Sign the Open Letter ✍️ Worth Valley By-Election - What you need to know 🚜 Stop the Family Farm Tax 🚨 Stop the Grooming Gangs Robbie Moore MP Digital ID - Have your say Tweet On Monday 8 December, I will be leading the debate AGAINST the rollout of mandatory digital ID. The official parliamentary petition has garnered nearly 3 million signatures across the UK. Now, I'd like to hear your thoughts as I prepare for the debate. If you would like to share your thoughts or experiences on this issue and/or you would be happy for me to share these in Parliament, please do fill out my survey below: Digital ID Survey Current Your details Leave this field blank Do you support the rollout of mandatory Digital ID? Yes No Other [Optional] Why? Share your thoughts or experiences Are you happy for me to share your experiences in my speech in Parliament? Yes No Yes, but anonymously In order to make this survey representative, how did you vote in the 2024 General Election? Labour Lib Dem Conservative Green Reform Independent Rather not say Did not vote This question contains special category data relating to your political opinion that may be shared with the wider Conservative Party for the purposes of Democratic Engagement with your permission. Please only answer this question if you consent to the processing of this data and sharing it with Conservative Party in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy policy . If you do not answer this question then this data will not be shared. If a General Election were to be called tomorrow, what are the chances of you voting for each of the following parties? Questions Answers Labour 0 10 Clear Lib Dem 0 10 Clear Conservative 0 10 Clear Green 0 10 Clear Reform 0 10 Clear Independent 0 10 Clear This question contains special category data relating to your political opinion that may be shared with the wider Conservative Party for the purposes of Democratic Engagement with your permission. Please only answer this question if you consent to the processing of this data and sharing it with Conservative Party in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy policy . If you do not answer this question then this data will not be shared. headings: h2: RSS feeds and news syndication
h3: Robbie Moore MP Delivering your priorities for Keighley and Ilkley
pages.text_excerpt: About RSS | Robbie Moore MP Skip to main content Robbie Moore MP Main navigation Home Campaigns Keighley & Ilkley News 🏥 New Airedale Hospital SECURED Contact 🔍 Search Digital ID - Have your say Stop The Scouts Tax - Sign the Open Letter ✍️ Worth Valley By-Election - What you need to know 🚜 Stop the Family Farm Tax 🚨 Stop the Grooming Gangs Robbie Moore MP About RSS RSS feeds and news syndication News feeds Events feeds You can read the latest news from this website using your news reader, or display them on your own website using RSS (Rich Site Summary) XML documents, wherever you see the orange RSS symbol. What is RSS? RSS is a defacto XML standard invented by Netscape for news distribution, now used by thousands of sites. RSS is an open format that uses a simple set of XML tags to define a news "channel" that allows any site to provide basic meta-information about your new content (headline, link, description). Whenever you use our RSS feeds publicly (where anyone but yourself would be reading them), you should provide proper attribution to this website. We cannot provide advice or technical support in the coding and integration of our RSS feeds into your site or software. Additionally we ask that you cache the RSS feed and do not query more than once in any hour.
